nasb.text: But the other disciples came in the little boat, for they were not far from the land, but about one hundred yards away, dragging the net full of fish.

esv.text: The other disciples came in the boat, dragging the net full of fish, for they were not far from the land, but about a hundred yards off.

cnv.text: 其他的門徒，因為離岸不遠，就坐在小船上，把那網魚拖過來。

ccb.text: 其他门徒离岸不远，约有一百米，他们随后用船把那一网鱼拖到岸边。

csbs.text: 其他在船上的门徒，拖着满网的鱼过来了。他们离岸不远，约有九十公尺。
